instructions: Synthesize the five provided module audit reports into a single `executive_summary.md` file saved in `docs/audit_v2/`. Highlight the 100% pass rate for static typing (Pyright), linting (Ruff), and cognitive complexity (Complexipy). Note that the Vulture dead-code warnings are expected framework false-positives (Pydantic fields, Typer callbacks, MCP handlers). Finally, explicitly document the two remaining technical debt items (`# noqa: BLE001` in `orchestrator.py` and `handlers.py`) as targets for the next sprint.
anti_patterns: STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: Do not recommend fixing the Vulture dead code warnings; they are false positives.
STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: Do not modify any Python source code.
STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: Do not include raw CLI output in the executive summary.
completion_criteria: The summary evaluates the health of the 4 strict DDD layers.
The summary isolates the two BLE001 ignores as the only remaining tech debt.
